title: How TSMC Helped SK Hynix Overtake Samsung in the AI Memory Race
gist: A teaser recounting how SK Hynix, long Samsung's runner-up, briefly overtook Samsung in market value and is preparing a Nasdaq ADR listing on the back of the AI/HBM boom, with the turnaround rooted a decade earlier in the CoWoS packaging technology and a partnership with TSMC rather than in the ChatGPT moment.

insights.claim: SK Hynix, long the memory industry's perennial runner-up in Samsung's shadow, briefly surpassed Samsung in market value last month as Nvidia's exploding HBM demand put it at the center of technology's most important supply chain.
insights.speaker: SemiWiki
insights.so_what: HBM leadership has re-rated SK Hynix above Samsung; a marker of how AI memory demand is reshuffling the memory hierarchy.
insights.quote: Last month, SK hynix briefly surpassed Samsung in market value.

insights.claim: SK Hynix is preparing a historic Nasdaq ADR listing in the United States.
insights.speaker: SemiWiki
insights.so_what: A US ADR listing would broaden SK Hynix's investor access and is a near-term catalyst to watch.
insights.quote: Now, it is preparing for a historic Nasdaq ADR listing in the United States.
insights.locator: Now, it is preparing for a historic Nasdaq ADR listing

insights.claim: SK Hynix's reversal did not begin with ChatGPT but more than a decade earlier, with a then-obscure packaging technology called CoWoS and an unlikely partnership with TSMC.
insights.speaker: SemiWiki
insights.so_what: Attributes SK Hynix's AI-memory dominance to early CoWoS/TSMC positioning, underscoring advanced packaging as the durable enabler behind HBM supremacy.
insights.quote: It began more than a decade ago with a forgotten product launch, an obscure packaging technology called CoWoS, and an unlikely partner: TSMC.
insights.locator: But this reversal didn’t begin with ChatGPT
